decisions.rationale: The claim about existing conditions at East Fordham Road and Webster Avenue was presented in the slide deck materials for Webster Avenue SBS CAC Meeting #3. The claim text explicitly names East Fordham Road and Webster Avenue which is part of the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service project corridor.
